speaker: LARTIUS
text: So, let the ports be guarded. Keep your duties

speaker: LARTIUS
text: As I have set them down. If I do send, dispatch

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Those centuries to our aid; the rest will serve

speaker: LARTIUS
text: For a short holding. If we lose the field,

speaker: LARTIUS
text: Hence, and shut your gates upon ’s.

speaker: LARTIUS
text:
(
                To
                 
                the
                 
                Scout
                .
                )
                 
              Our guider, come. To th’ Roman camp conduct us.
